mapper.sql: select package_id, demand_id, artifact_type, version_no, content, status, version_note, create_by, create_time from req_package_version
mapper.select: where demand_id = #{demandId} order by artifact_type asc, version_no desc
select ifnull(max(version_no), 0) from req_package_version where demand_id = #{demandId} and artifact_type = #{artifactType}
mapper.insert: insert into req_package_version(demand_id, artifact_type, version_no, content, status, version_note, create_by, create_time) values(#{demandId}, #{artifactType}, #{versionNo}, #{content}, #{status}, #{versionNote}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select count(1) from req_package_version where artifact_type = #{artifactType}
